Metadata.SourceFile: Pancho (Rug Rider and Pancho - Side 2 - Tri Micro).g64
Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x8009 "PANCHO-8009" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Pancho.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Made the following changes to allow the space bar or the joystick button in port two to skip the title screen: 1. Patched the LDA $1682 instruction at $9508 to be JSR $C000 instead 2. Added a small routine at $C000 to check the space bar and the fire button in port 2 - if either is pressed, then it balances the stack and jumps to the routine at $9072 to start the game. If not pressed, the routine then executes the LDA $1682 instruction and returns to carry on the normal code flow.
